title: ochthocharis javanica
intro: Ochthocharis javanica, also known as Javanese toothache plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to numb the mouth and reduce pain associated with toothaches and gum infections. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing swelling and preventing the spread of infection. Ochthocharis javanica can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries in various parts of the world.
